semantic.role: Public release notes and version changelog for the ArchSpine mirror system.
responsibilities: Lists features and improvements introduced in each public release of ArchSpine (e.g., v1.0.0).
Documents reliability enhancements, workflow additions, and documentation updates across versions.
Provides a high-level historical record for users tracking system evolution.
outOfScope: Does not include detailed developer architecture, user tutorials, or future roadmap items.
Does not cover internal pre-release development or private changes.

English.purpose: This changelog records the notable changes and additions for each public release of ArchSpine, starting with version 1.0.0. It helps users and contributors understand what has been added, improved, or documented in a given release.
English.context_and_audience: Intended for anyone using or contributing to ArchSpine — from CLI users wanting an overview of new commands, to integrators tracking reliability upgrades and documentation status. This page is the authoritative source for what ships in each version.
key_takeaways: ArchSpine v1.0.0 is the first public open-source release, introducing core CLI workflows such as try, init, build, sync, publish, check, fix, and MCP.
Reliability enhancements include protected output boundaries, atomic file writes, and lock-based mutual exclusion to ensure safe runtime operations.
Documentation is provided in English and Simplified Chinese, covering protocol details, runbooks, MCP integration, local LLM configuration, and more.
